en.name: STM-9 Gen.2 "Competition Ghost"
en.description: Originally a Soyuz-TM STM-9 Gen.2 competition PCC built with input from Full-Auto Rifle bronze medalist Vadim Mikhailov. This particular rifle found its way into Tony's workshop, where competition polish met combat practicality. The action has been tuned for faster cycling, recoil impulse softened, and the feed system optimized for Glock-pattern magazines. What started as a sport shooter became something far more dangerous. Tony claims it still shoots like a race gun — it just wasn't meant for the range anymore.
